steps.title: First step: Intention and Ihram
steps.details:
• Intend to perform Umrah, enter into Ihram at Miqat, and begin Talbiyah.
  • He adhered to the prohibitions Ihram, and completed the ritual purification before beginning the ritual.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:196 and the year of beginning the rituals from Miqat.
steps.referenceLabel: Ministry of Umrah and Visit Guide

steps.title: Step Two: Entering Al-Masjid Al-Haram
steps.details:
• Enter quietly, with prayer and humility.
  • Start from the side that facilitates safe movement through the crowds, then head towards the Tawaf area.
steps.evidence: General prophetic guidelines on etiquette in mosques and facilitating worship.

steps.title: Step three: Tawaf (seven circuits)
steps.details:
• Perform Tawaf around Kaabah seven times, starting from the Black Stone line.
  • Keep remembering God and avoid harming others in crowd movement.
  • Tip: Use the Apple Watch app to help you count your Tawaf circuits.
  • Tip: Use the Wear OS app on your watch to help you count your Tawaf circuits.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:29 and the documented descriptions of the Prophet's circumambulation.

steps.title: Step Four: Prayer after Tawaf
steps.details: • Pray two rak'ahs after completing Tawaf if possible without harming the congregation, then proceed in an organized manner to drink Zamzam water.
steps.evidence: A well-established practice in authentic hadiths regarding the prayer after Tawaf.
steps.referenceLabel: Ministry of Umrah and Visit Guide

steps.title: Step five: Saie between Safa and Marwah
steps.details:
• Perform Saie for seven circuits between Safa and Marwah, starting from Safa and ending at Marwah, with supplication and remembrance.
  • Tip: Use the Apple Watch app to help you count Saie runs.
  • Tip: Use the Wear OS app on your watch to help you count Saie runs.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:158 and the authentic narrations according to the order of the messenger.

steps.title: Step six: Haircut or shave
steps.details:
• Men shave or cut their hair, and women trim a small portion of it.
  • And with this, the Umrah ends and Ihram ends.
steps.evidence: Quran 48:27 and the authentic narrations related to shaving and shortening.
steps.referenceLabel: Ministry of Umrah and Visit Guide

steps.title: First step: Ihram and the intention for Hajj
steps.details:
• Enter ihram at Miqat, intend your type of Hajj, then proceed with Talbiyah.
  • Adhere to the rules Ihram until you reach the exits Ihram.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:196 and the agreed-upon prophetic rituals for the commencement of Hajj.

steps.title: Step Two: Yawm at-Tarwiyah in Mina
steps.details: • On the eighth of Dhul Hijjah, head to Mina, perform the prayers at their appointed times, and prepare spiritually and logistically for the commemoration Arafah.
steps.evidence: A documented sequence of rituals in the farewell journey.

steps.title: Step three: Standing at Arafah
steps.details:
• Spend the ninth day of Dhul Hijjah in Arafah praying, remembering God, and repenting.
  • This is the essential pillar of Hajj.

steps.title: Step four: Muzdalifah and collecting pebbles
steps.details: • After sunset, go to Muzdalifah, pray Maghrib and Isha, spend the night there, and collect pebbles for throwing stones at Mina.
steps.evidence: The prophetic sequence after Arafah in authentic narrations.

steps.title: Step Five: Rami, Sacrifice, and Poetry
steps.details: • On the day of Eid, when throwing Jamarat al-Aqabah stone, perform the sacrifice where necessary, then shave or cut your hair for the first tahlil.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:36-37 and the sequence of authentic hadiths.

steps.title: Step six: Tawaf al-Ifadah (seven rounds)
steps.details:
• Return to Mecca to perform Tawaf al-Ifadah, complete seven circuits, and maintain safe and orderly movement during busy times.
  • Tip: Use the Apple Watch app to help you count your Tawaf circuits.
  • Tip: Use the Wear OS app on your watch to help you count your Tawaf circuits.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:29 and the documented descriptions of the obligatory circumambulation.

steps.title: Step 7: Tell the person who is needed
steps.details:
• Perform Saie when your type of Hajj requires it, while maintaining the sequence and the number of seven circuits between Safa and Marwah.
  • Tip: Use the Apple Watch app to help you count Saie runs.
  • Tip: Use the Wear OS app on your watch to help you count Saie runs.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:158 and its jurisprudential application in the rituals of Hajj.

steps.title: Step 8: Ayyam at-Tashriq and Tawaf al-Wada'
steps.details:
• Staying in Mina during Tashreeq to perform the rituals of throwing Jamarat, then completing Tawaf al-Wada' before leaving Makkah, except for those who are exempt.
  • Tip: Use the Apple Watch app to help you count your Tawaf circuits.
  • Tip: Use the Wear OS app on your watch to help you count your Tawaf circuits.
steps.evidence: The established rituals are based on the guidance Quran and the correct practice of the Prophetic Sunnah.
